title: IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: MFS CASH UNITUS COMMUNITY CREDIT UNION IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides federal and Oregon tax preparation through in-person appointments. IRS-certified volunteers prepare most individual tax returns and limited self-employment returns. Includes help with applying for or renewing an Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN) and information about available tax credits. Accepts volunteers for client facilitators, interpreters, outreach committee members, and tax preparers. 3215 SW Cedar Hills Boulevard Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Household income at or below $69,000 None of the following: Rental property, sale of cryptocurrency, or adjustments on education expenses (box 4 or 6 on 1098-T) Self employment income with any of the following: Over $50,000 in expenses, a loss for the year, employees, business use of the home, depreciation or amortization Hours: Open Tuesday, February 10, 2026-April 14, 2026 from 9am-1pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to make an appointment or for more information. Visit website or email for volunteer opportunities. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: See website for required documents LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Cantonese, Mandarin, Russian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Earned Income Credit Information Individual Taxpayer Identification Numbers Tax Preparation Assistance Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MFS CASH UNITUS COMMUNITY CREDIT UNION
